compiled_state.title: As a sub-agent, I can emit friction observations that are captured without write tool access
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: A PostToolUse hook on Agent tool returns that extracts SUGGESTION: sentinel lines from sub-agent output and records them via suggestion-record.sh
**Why**: Sub-agents frequently encounter friction but many lack Bash/Write tool access. The sentinel pattern (matching CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN precedent) lets them emit suggestions in plain text output without schema changes
**Scope**:
- IN: PostToolUse hook for Agent tool returns, single-line sentinel format (SUGGESTION: <one-line summary>), extraction of first sentinel per return, warning log for malformed/absent sentinels, calls suggestion-record.sh with source=sub-agent-sentinel
- OUT: Agent-driven capture (Story 2), stop hook (Story 3), retro integration (Story 5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, sub-agents can emit SUGGESTION: <one-line summary> in their output text and the PostToolUse hook extracts the first such line per Agent tool return
  ← Satisfies: "Sub-agents emit SUGGESTION: <one-line summary> in their output text; a PostToolUse hook on Agent tool returns extracts the first such line per return"
- When this story is complete, extracted sentinels are passed to suggestion-record.sh and result in a suggestion record in .suggestions/
  ← Satisfies: "passes it to suggestion-record.sh"
- When this story is complete, malformed sentinels log a warning rather than crashing the hook
  ← Satisfies: "logs a warning if the sentinel is malformed or absent"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Test edge cases: no sentinel in output, malformed sentinel, multiple sentinels (only first extracted), sentinel embedded in verbose output text
- [Reliability] Hook must be registered in the PostToolUse dispatcher for Agent tool — verify existing install path handles upgrade
- [Maintainability] Sentinel format follows established CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN pattern — document in the same contract style

comments.body: Done definition update: The sentinel extraction hook must integrate with the existing consolidated dispatcher architecture (post-all.sh or equivalent), not as a separate settings.json entry. Must filter for Agent tool returns within the dispatcher, following the established pattern.
comments.author: Claude
